Class PlanSumComponent

Namespace
VMS.TPS.Common.Model.API

VMS.TPS.Common.Model.API.dll

Represents a component plan of a plan sum.

public class PlanSumComponent : ApiDataObject, IXmlSerializable

Properties

PlanSetupId

The unique identification of the plan within the course.

public string PlanSetupId { get; }

Property Value

string

PlanSumOperation

The summing operation (+ or -) that defines how the dose of a component plan contributes to the plan sum.

public PlanSumOperation PlanSumOperation { get; }

Property Value

PlanSumOperation

PlanWeight

The weight of a component plan included in the plan sum.

public double PlanWeight { get; }

Property Value

double
